description: Trigger evaluation for skill description optimization

queries.query: I need to implement a new user authentication feature with JWT tokens
queries.reason: Implementing new feature - clear use case for TDD workflow

queries.query: Can you build a REST API endpoint for creating blog posts?
Add a caching layer to our database queries
queries.reason: Adding new functionality to existing system

queries.query: Create a new module for handling file uploads with validation
queries.reason: Creating new module - explicit trigger phrase

queries.query: Implement password strength validation for our registration form
We need to add rate limiting functionality to our API
Build a notification system that sends emails when users sign up
I want to develop a search feature with filters and pagination
Create a payment processing integration with Stripe
Add analytics tracking to our application
There's a bug in the login function - it's not validating passwords correctly
queries.reason: Bug fix, not new feature - should use debugging skill

queries.query: Can you refactor this function to be more readable?
queries.reason: Refactoring existing code, not new feature

queries.query: Update the README with installation instructions
Review my pull request for the authentication changes
I need a quick prototype to test an idea
queries.reason: Prototype/throwaway code - TDD overhead not justified

queries.query: Change the database connection string in the config file
Fix the TypeScript compilation errors in utils.ts
Optimize this database query that's running slowly
Add comments to explain what this algorithm does
Rename this variable to be more descriptive
